author: Matt
body: Nice one, yo……glad to see you escaped from the “real world” clutches long enough to get a blog in!!

author: Burgo
body: Thanks Matt… yeah, it’s a pity that the first thing that had to take a back seat is the blogging, but priorities must be, etc. The good news is, Jason was last night, and next week I have another gig at the Tiv to go to… Death Cab! So at least there’s still time for some gigs :P

author: Marc
body: Hahahaha… I was there last night, that dude dancing behind the sax player in the crowd was hilarious!

author: Jess
body: Came to this post from the rightkindofphrase forums… just wanted to say thanks for sharing this with us!

author: K-Man
body: This was the best gig ever!!! Thanks for bloggin” by the looks of the photo we were in the same area. :)

author: Airj
body: i went to jason’s march show and his one the other nite, it was great, i was a bit disappointed though that he didn’t play mr. curiousity or you and i both, was waiting it the whole night, but netherless it was still a killer show!

author: Burgo
Horse
body:
HAHA!

A couple of quotes here I really liked:

1) “Shit got real”  
2) “I did kind of bliss out on the music”  
3) “swooning and swaying with much love”

Great post Burgo, i will definitely try to catch Jason Mraz in Brisbane next time!
